# Chad's To-Do List
*Generated by Gus — 2026-03-20*

These are the things only you can do. I've handled everything else.

---

## 🔴 This Week (Blockers)

### 1. Stripe Account Setup
- Go to stripe.com, create/login to account
- Dashboard → Developers → API Keys
- Copy the "Publishable key" (pk_live_...) and "Secret key" (sk_live_...)
- Send them to me — I'll wire up payment on the direct booking site
- Takes 10 minutes. Unlocks actual bookings.

### 2. Airbnb iCal URL
- Go to airbnb.com → Your listings → The Pearl Craftsman
- Calendar → Availability → Export Calendar
- Copy the .ics URL
- Send it to me — I'll sync availability so we don't double-book
- Takes 2 minutes.

### 3. Google Analytics IDs
Two sites need real GA4 IDs:
- Go to analytics.google.com → Create 2 properties:
  - "MTR Direct" (mtr-saas.vercel.app)
  - "The Pearl Craftsman" (mtr-direct-booking.vercel.app)
- Copy the Measurement IDs (G-XXXXXXXXXX)
- Send them to me — I'll swap the placeholders in the code
- Takes 15 minutes.

## 🟡 This Week (Marketing — Do These Yourself, High ROI)

### 4. Post in Facebook Groups
Join and post in these San Antonio groups today:
- "San Antonio Travel Nurse Housing"
- "Military Housing San Antonio TX"
- "Fort Sam Houston Housing"
- "Lackland AFB Housing"

Post text (copy/paste):
> Available now — The Pearl Craftsman, 3BR/2BA furnished home in Tobin Hill, San Antonio. All utilities included. Near Baptist Medical, Methodist, Lackland AFB. Direct booking saves you 15% vs Airbnb. [mtr-direct-booking.vercel.app]

Include 2-3 property photos. Post weekly, rotate photos.

### 5. Furnished Finder Profile Update
- Add direct booking site URL to your FF listing description
- Make sure response time is shown as fast (Alex now responds in <10 min)
- Highlight: hospitals nearby, military bases, all utilities included

### 6. Travel Nurse Agency Outreach
Email housing coordinators at these agencies:
- Aya Healthcare (ayahealthcare.com/housing)
- AMN Healthcare
- Cross Country Nurses
- Travel Nurse Across America

Template:
> Hi, I'm a host in San Antonio with a fully furnished 3BR/2BA home near Baptist Medical Center and Lackland AFB. We offer direct booking (no platform fees) and flexible monthly rates. Happy to discuss preferred vendor arrangements. [direct booking link]

One relationship here = recurring leads for years.

- Once GA4 is live and we have baseline traffic data
- Start with $15/day targeting: "furnished rental san antonio", "travel nurse housing san antonio"

### 8. CHBO Listing
- corporatehousingbyowner.com — annual fee ~$599
- Targets corporate renters, high quality leads
- Worth it once the direct booking flow is fully working
